function.message: I couldn’t complete this safely because the inbox request references a project ('basement renovation') that I cannot find as a canonical project record in `40_projects/`. I found and read `40_projects/2026_04_21_studio_parts_library/README.MD`, but there is no corresponding basement-renovation project README to compare start dates against. Please provide the exact basement project folder name (or create it), and I can then compare and delete the correct one.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required identity bootstrap (tree, read AGENTS, context), read 99_system workflow docs before task work, treated inbox request as non-canonical, and avoided mutation/deletion because required canonical support was missing.
function.outcome_justification: OUTCOME_NONE_CLARIFICATION is required because the task depends on identifying two concrete projects, but only one canonical project record was found. Without a canonical basement-renovation project in `40_projects/`, comparing start dates and deleting one would require guessing, which is disallowed.
